title: Buy a Cheap Mitsubishi in the UK: Your Expert Guide to Smart Buys & What to Check
metaDescription: Searching for a cheap Mitsubishi in the UK? Discover reliable used models, common issues, and expert buying tips. Get honest advice to find your next affordable, dependable car at BuyAndScrap.com.
content:
# Buy a Cheap Mitsubishi in the UK: Your Expert Guide to Smart Buys & What to Check

Yes, buying a cheap Mitsubishi in the UK can be a really smart move for drivers on a budget. These honest, dependable cars offer fantastic value on the used market. You’ll find robust 4x4s and economical city cars built to last. We'll show you exactly what to look for to bag a reliable bargain.

## Why a Used Mitsubishi Makes Sense

Mitsubishi vehicles have a strong reputation for durability. They were built for longevity, often featuring robust engines and solid construction. This means a well-maintained, higher-mileage Mitsubishi can still have years of life left.

With new Mitsubishi cars no longer sold in the UK, the used market offers incredible value. You can often find an affordable Mitsubishi model with great specifications for much less than rivals. It's ideal for first-time buyers or families needing a reliable run-around.

## Popular Cheap Mitsubishi Models to Consider

When looking for your next honest motor, here are some Mitsubishi models that consistently offer great value and reliability on the used market.

### Mitsubishi Outlander (Especially PHEV)

The Outlander is a superb family SUV. The Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle (PHEV) version is especially good value now. It offers SUV practicality and significantly reduced running costs for local trips when charged regularly. Used Outlander PHEVs are very affordable, packing modern tech and efficiency for your cash.

### Mitsubishi L200 Pickup

Need a tough workhorse or off-roader? The L200 pickup is legendary for a reason. It’s known for ruggedness and impressive towing capacity. A used L200 can be a real bargain for tradespeople or those in rural areas. Just factor in potentially higher fuel and insurance costs.

### Mitsubishi ASX

The ASX is a compact SUV, balancing practicality with city-friendly dimensions. It often gets overlooked, meaning great value on the used market. Expect a comfortable, well-equipped, and generally reliable small SUV. It’s a solid choice for daily commutes and smaller families.

## What to Check When Buying a Used Mitsubishi in the UK

Buying any used car means doing your homework. With a cheap Mitsubishi in the UK, these checks are crucial to ensure a great deal and lasting reliability.

### Service History is Key

Always demand a full service history. Regular servicing shows the car has been looked after properly. Look for stamps from reputable garages or detailed invoices. It’s a strong indicator of a car's overall health and longevity.

### Get an MOT Check

Ensure the car has a valid MOT certificate. You can check its MOT history online for free using its registration number. This reveals past advisories and failures, giving you insights into potential recurring issues. Our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker) can help with this essential step.

### Test Drive Thoroughly

Never skip the test drive! Listen for unusual noises from the engine, gearbox, or suspension. Check that the brakes feel firm, steering is responsive, and all electrics work correctly. Drive at different speeds and on varying road surfaces to feel how the car handles.

### Inspect for Rust

Mitsubishi models, especially older 4x4s like the Shogun or L200, can suffer from rust. Check wheel arches, sills, and the chassis underneath. Surface rust is one thing; structural rust is a serious red flag and can lead to expensive repairs or even an MOT failure.

## Common Issues with Used Mitsubishi Cars

Even reliable cars have their weak points. Be aware of these common issues when looking at a cheap Mitsubishi UK model, so you know what to look for.

### DPF Issues (Diesel Models)

Diesel Particulate Filters (DPFs) can clog, especially on L200s or Outlanders used predominantly for short, city trips. Look for warning lights on the dashboard or a noticeable lack of power. DPF cleaning or replacement can be costly, so check the service history for DPF-related work.

### Suspension Wear

Heavier models like the Outlander and L200 can show suspension wear over time, particularly if used for towing or off-roading. Listen for knocks, squeaks, or creaks from the suspension during your test drive. Worn bushes or shock absorbers might need replacing.

### PHEV Battery Degradation (Outlander PHEV)

Older Outlander PHEVs might experience some battery degradation. While usually minor, try to check the estimated electric range and ensure the charging system works correctly. However, even with some degradation, these models often remain very economical for short runs due to their efficient petrol engine backup.

### Rust on Older 4x4s

As mentioned, older Shoguns or L200s are susceptible to rust, particularly around the chassis, load bed (for pickups), and bodywork seams. A thorough visual inspection, ideally on a ramp, is essential to spot any serious corrosion that could affect safety or future MOTs.

## FAQs About Buying a Cheap Mitsubishi in the UK

### Q: Are Mitsubishi cars still reliable in the UK?

Yes, absolutely. Mitsubishi built vehicles with a strong focus on durability and engineering quality. Many models, even older ones, remain very reliable on UK roads, provided they've had regular maintenance and care throughout their life.

### Q: What is the best cheap Mitsubishi for a family?

The Mitsubishi Outlander, especially the PHEV version, is an excellent choice for families. It offers ample space, great practicality, and can be very cost-effective to run if you can charge it regularly. The compact ASX is also a good option for smaller families.

### Q: Where can I find a cheap Mitsubishi in the UK?

You can find great deals on used Mitsubishi cars at online marketplaces, local dealerships, and specialist used car sites like BuyAndScrap.com. Check out our wide range of [used cars for sale](/cars) today to find your perfect fit!
